description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Book timed general admission tickets for 2 adults and 1 child on a Saturday afternoon in May 2026, choosing the earliest available time slot starting at or after 3:00 pm, then open the visit summary page.

target_names: General Museum Entry
General Entry Timeslot on 2026-05-16 from 15:00 to 16:00

tasks.instruction: Create a self-guided tour by adding 4 pre-1500 European cheese exhibits from 4 different European countries, each with an estimated visit time of 25 minutes or less so the total stays within 90 minutes, then open your route overview page.

target_names: Alpine Wheels: Medieval Italian Mountain Cheeses
Silent Cellars: Monastic Cheeses of Medieval France
Valley Pastures: Early Swiss Cheese Trade
Cheese of the Aegean: Ancient and Medieval Greece

tasks.instruction: On a selected date in August 2026, find English-language guided tours costing at most €25, choose the option with the longest duration, set 1 adult ticket, and continue to the booking details page.

target_names: Grand Tour of Cheese History
Grand Tour of Cheese History Session on 2026-08-10 at 10:00

tasks.instruction: Find and add 3 cheese aging and maturation articles covering roughly 1800–1950 with estimated reading times of 10 minutes or less to your personal reading list, then open your reading list page.

target_names: Affinage Basics: How European Cheesemakers Aged Cheese in the Early 1800s
Rise of the Affineur: Professional Cheese Aging 1850–1900
From Cellar to Cold Room: Cheese Aging 1900–1920

tasks.instruction: Register for a weekend morning family cheese workshop in June 2026 designed for ages 8–12 that costs no more than €40 per participant, for 1 adult and 2 children, and proceed to the registration review page.

tasks.instruction: Use the interactive cheese history timeline to pin 3 events dated between about 2000 BCE and 1 CE and 2 events dated between 1900 and 1950 CE to your personal timeline, then open the “My Timeline” view.

target_names: Clay Strainers Used for Curdling Milk
Cheese Depicted in Egyptian Tomb Paintings
Cheese in Homeric Poetry
Refrigerated Railcars Transform Cheese Transport
Patent Filed for Processed Cheese

tasks.instruction: In the online shop, add 2 paperback books about European cheese history priced under $30 and rated at least 4 stars, plus 1 paperback book about modern cheese science priced under $25 and rated at least 4 stars, then open your cart and choose the standard domestic shipping option.

target_names: Wheels of Time: A History of European Cheese
From Monks to Markets: Medieval European Cheeses
Modern Cheese Science: From Microbes to Markets
Standard Domestic (5–7 days)
